title: Operation scoped cleanup and await followups
goal: Let reactive cleanup and await_members commands target the same operation-scoped run_id as operation_id-created workers.
completionConditions: A helper derives operation-scoped run_id from operation_id while preserving explicit run_id priority.
cleanup uses the derived run scope when operation_id is present and run_id is omitted.
await_members uses the derived run scope when operation_id is present and no explicit run_id/member scope is requested.
Focused tests, cargo check, selfdev build/reload, governance, commit and push pass.
notes: Continuation of issue #13. This reduces accidental broad cleanup and makes operation_id retries/follow-up commands more fluid.
